reason: The printed Cloudflare CLI shipped vendor API-doc boilerplate as the catalog/skill introduction instead of explaining what the generated CLI is for.
behavior: Cloudflare user-facing README, skill, MCP/tool metadata, and release description should describe the CLI as an agent-ready Cloudflare operations surface for accounts, zones, DNS, Workers, Pages, R2, tunnels, Zero Trust, token diagnostics, and infrastructure workflows.
